ddls:
CREATE TABLE "employees" (
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each employee */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the employee */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the employee */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the employee */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the department where the employee is assigned */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the employee */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the employee */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the employee */,
  "hire_date" TEXT /* Date the employee was hired */,
  "termination_date" TEXT /* Date the employee was terminated (if applicable) */,
  "position_id" INTEGER /* Current position of the employee */,
  "job_type_id" INTEGER /* Current job type of the employee */,
  "supervisor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee's supervisor (manager) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("employee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employees_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employees_supervisor_id FOREIGN KEY ("supervisor_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employees_position_id FOREIGN KEY ("position_id") REFERENCES positions ("position_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employees_job_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("job_type_id") REFERENCES job_types ("job_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "departments" (
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each department */,
  "department_name" TEXT /* Name of the department */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the department */,
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the department manager */,
  "location" TEXT /* Physical location of the department */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("department_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_departments_manager_id FOREIGN KEY ("manager_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "positions" (
  "position_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each position */,
  "position_name" TEXT /* Name of the position (e.g., Assistant Manager) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the position */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Department associated with the position */,
  "salary_range" TEXT /* Salary range for the position */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("position_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_positions_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "areas" (
  "area_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each area */,
  "area_name" TEXT /* Name of the area (e.g., A, B) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the area */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Department associated with the area */,
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the area manager */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("area_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_areas_manager_id FOREIGN KEY ("manager_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_areas_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "routes" (
  "route_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each route */,
  "route_name" TEXT /* Name of the route (e.g., BATANGAS, IBAAN) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the route */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Department associated with the route */,
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the route manager */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("route_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_routes_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_routes_manager_id FOREIGN KEY ("manager_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "shifts" (
  "shift_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each shift */,
  "shift_name" TEXT /* Name of the shift (e.g., DS, ADS) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the shift */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Department associated with the shift */,
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the shift manager */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("shift_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_shifts_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_shifts_manager_id FOREIGN KEY ("manager_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "work_schedules" (
  "schedule_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each work schedule */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee the schedule belongs to */,
  "schedule" TEXT /* Name of the schedule (e.g., 8:00 - 5:00) */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the schedule */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the schedule */,
  "shift_id" INTEGER /* ID of the shift associated with the schedule */,
  "area_id" INTEGER /* ID of the area where the schedule is applicable */,
  "route_id" INTEGER /* ID of the route where the schedule is applicable */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("schedule_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_work_schedules_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_work_schedules_area_id FOREIGN KEY ("area_id") REFERENCES areas ("area_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_work_schedules_route_id FOREIGN KEY ("route_id") REFERENCES routes ("route_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_work_schedules_shift_id FOREIGN KEY ("shift_id") REFERENCES shifts ("shift_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "job_types" (
  "job_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each job type */,
  "job_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the job type (e.g., Temporary, Permanent) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the job type */,
  "benefits" TEXT /* Information about the benefits associated with the job type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("job_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "employee_positions" (
  "employee_position_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each employee-position assignment */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee */,
  "position_id" INTEGER /* ID of the position */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the assignment */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the assignment (if applicable) */,
  "shift_id" INTEGER /* ID of the shift associated with the position */,
  "area_id" INTEGER /* ID of the area associated with the position */,
  "route_id" INTEGER /* ID of the route associated with the position */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("employee_position_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employee_positions_shift_id FOREIGN KEY ("shift_id") REFERENCES shifts ("shift_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employee_positions_area_id FOREIGN KEY ("area_id") REFERENCES areas ("area_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employee_positions_position_id FOREIGN KEY ("position_id") REFERENCES positions ("position_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employee_positions_route_id FOREIGN KEY ("route_id") REFERENCES routes ("route_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employee_positions_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "attendance" (
  "attendance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each attendance record */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of attendance */,
  "status" TEXT /* Attendance status (e.g., present, absent) */,
  "check_in_time" TEXT /* Time the employee checked in */,
  "check_out_time" TEXT /* Time the employee checked out */,
  "late" INTEGER /* Whether the employee was late */,
  "early_departure" INTEGER /* Whether the employee left early */,
  "hours_worked" INTEGER /* Total hours worked in the day */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("attendance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_attendance_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., HR administrator, department manager, employee) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for user authentication */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Whether the user account is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
